arts.ttl: Wolves star Jose Sa jumps into crowd to confront fan thrown out in chaotic scenes

arts.ttl: Multiple factors make club ‘regret’ their transfer decision with Bournemouth player
arts.sum: Milos Kerkez arrived at AFC Bournemouth from AZ Alkmaar in July 2023 and made 28 league appearances for the Cherries last season. The left-back has cemented his place at Bournemouth this season, making 12 starts in the Premier League. arts.ttl: Cunha to Man Utd? Wolves boss responds to persistent link
arts.sum: Wolves boss Gary O'Neil has emphatically ruled out a January sale of Matheus Cunha amid renewed links to Manchester United . However, Wolves boss Gary O'Neil has now emphatically ruled out a January sale of his star man when quizzed about the interest in Cunha.
